name: Rectron Limited
summary: Rectron Limited manufactures and sells discrete semiconductors in Taiwan and internationally. Its products include bridge rectifiers, ESD diodes, high voltage products, recovery rectifiers, schottky diodes, signal-switching diodes, silicon carbide schottky, standard rectifiers, transistors, TVS and zener diodes, MOSFET, and other products. Rectron Limited was founded in 1976 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
